description_long: This is a low-top Nike sneaker designed for casual or athletic use, featuring a predominantly light gray upper with mesh and synthetic leather panels. The shoe has a rounded toe with visible wear and some discoloration, especially on the front and sides, indicating regular use. The Nike Swoosh logo is present on both the lateral and medial sides, with an additional black Nike tag stitched near the laces. The tongue is padded and displays a small Nike logo, while the heel tab also features a black Nike Swoosh. The sole is white with a slightly textured finish, and the interior lining appears to be soft and lightly cushioned. Subtle pink accents are visible on the tongue and inner collar, adding a touch of color to the otherwise neutral palette.
description: A light gray Nike sneaker with mesh and synthetic leather panels, visible wear, and pink accents. Features Nike logos on the sides, tongue, and heel, with a white textured sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, laces, and padded tongue with a small Nike logo; visible wear on the toe area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the Nike Swoosh, black Nike tag near the laces, and mesh paneling; wear and discoloration on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel tab with a black Nike Swoosh and the pink inner collar lining.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the Nike Swoosh, mesh and synthetic overlays, and more pronounced wear on the side and sole.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on heel tab and sides, small Nike logo on tongue, black Nike tag near laces
